message:
feat(mission): stabilize agent summary sort order and add performance scalability tests [ft-1i2ge.7.4]

mission_loop.rs:
- Replace sort_by_key(Reverse(total_assignments)) with a two-level sort
  that breaks ties by agent_id lexicographic order, ensuring deterministic
  and stable output for agent summary reports regardless of input order.
  Previously, agents with identical assignment counts could appear in
  arbitrary order across invocations.

mission_perf_scalability.rs (new, 785 lines):
- Add performance and scalability budget verification tests (ft-1i2ge.7.4)
  that measure mission loop/planner/dispatch latency and throughput at
  realistic agent swarm sizes, validating that performance stays within
  defined budgets as mission complexity scales

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
